message:
feat(storage,share): concurrent agent improvements to archive storage and share wizard

Follow-up changes from parallel agent development:
- storage/lib.rs: additional archive management and path normalization
  improvements (~200 lines of hardening)
- share/wizard.rs: refinements to the share publishing wizard flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
